examples: The Zapps say they intend to keep going, but may take a break in two years when their oldest son, Pampa, turn 10.
Above, Herman and Candelaria Zapp pose with baby Pampa in Alaska as they finish the first leg of their journey around the world in 2002.
Each of their four children was born in a different country: Pampa, 8, in the United States; Tehue, 5, in Argentina; Paloma, 3, in Canada; and little Wallaby, 1, in Australia.
Pampa Energia SA shares are currently trading off about 6.1% on the day.
This week the wheat and soya crops in the pampa humida, Argentina's breadbasket, west of Buenos Aires, were in danger.
